wizard.title: Connect Your Store
wizard.subtitle: Set up your e-commerce integration in 3 easy steps

shopify.name: Shopify
shopify.desc: Blog & article publishing via Admin API

instructions.title: How to get your Shopify API credentials
instructions.step1: Log in to your Shopify admin panel and go to Settings > Apps and sales channels.
instructions.step2: Click 'Develop apps' (you may need to enable developer mode first).
instructions.step3: Click 'Create an app' and name it 'Swarme Edge-Swarm'.
instructions.step4: Under 'API Scopes', select 'write_content' (this allows blog/article access).
instructions.step5: Click 'Install app' and copy the Admin API Access Token that appears.

woocommerce.name: WooCommerce
woocommerce.desc: WordPress blog publishing via REST API

instructions.title: How to get your WooCommerce API credentials
instructions.step1: Log in to your WordPress admin (yourdomain.com/wp-admin).
instructions.step2: Go to WooCommerce > Settings > Advanced > REST API.
instructions.step3: Click 'Add key'. Set a description like 'Swarme Integration'.
instructions.step5: Click 'Generate API key'. Copy both the Consumer Key and Consumer Secret.

bigcommerce.name: BigCommerce
bigcommerce.desc: Blog post publishing via Management API

instructions.title: How to get your BigCommerce API credentials
instructions.step1: Log in to your BigCommerce control panel.
instructions.step2: Go to Settings > API > API Accounts.
instructions.step3: Click 'Create API Account' > 'Create V2/V3 API Token'.
instructions.step4: Name it 'Swarme Integration'. Grant 'Modify' scope for 'Content'.
instructions.step5: Click 'Save'. Copy the Access Token and note the API Path (contains your Store Hash).

wizard.securityNotice: We only request access to your Blog/Article data to publish content. We NEVER request access to your payment, customer, or order data.
wizard.successMessage: Your store "{{storeName}}" is now connected. Swarme can publish content directly to your platform.
wizard.needHelp: Need help? Check the setup guide above.
wizard.noStoreConnected: No store connected yet. Connect a store to enable autopilot publishing.

hero.title: The SEO Infrastructure That Runs Itself
hero.subtitle: Swarme deploys a coordinated team of AI agents to research, produce, audit, and publish content across your entire storefront — continuously, at the edge, without human bottlenecks.

features.heading: Built for teams that refuse to scale manually
features.subheading: An end-to-end content operations platform running on Cloudflare's global edge network — zero infrastructure overhead.

multilang.title: Native Multi-Language Output
multilang.desc: Produce and publish search-optimized content in English, French, Spanish, and additional languages — without translation workflows.

vision.title: Computer Vision at the Edge
vision.desc: Automated image alt-text generation, WCAG accessibility auditing, and structured data markup via Workers AI.

integrations.title: Direct CMS Publishing
integrations.desc: Integrate with Shopify, WooCommerce, or BigCommerce and publish directly to your storefront — no manual exports.

cro.title: Conversion Rate Intelligence
cro.desc: Continuous scroll-depth, dwell-time, and CTA engagement telemetry. Underperforming content is flagged and queued for optimization.

edge.title: Global Edge Architecture
edge.desc: Powered by Cloudflare D1, KV, Durable Objects, and Vectorize — zero cold starts, sub-50ms responses worldwide.

decay.title: Automated Content Lifecycle
decay.desc: Scheduled decay analysis identifies aging content. AI-generated refresh drafts are surfaced for editorial review before going live.

analyzer.heading: Assess any website in seconds
analyzer.subheading: Enter a URL to receive a comprehensive SEO, accessibility, and performance diagnostic — no account required.
